entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring physical traits of organisms

entities.name: ADAPTATION

entities.description: A category of crops that produce seeds in pods and are used as grains

entities.description: The amount of agricultural product produced per unit area

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production, often measured as output per unit area
